name: stop: an opted-out guest replying START opts back in — Opted Out cleared and Opted Out At nulled (B14/F24)
comment: The opt-back-in half of behaviour 4. START (any case) clears Opted Out and nulls Opted Out At, and confirms with a welcome-back that also restates how to opt out again. Case-insensitive by the same lowercasing as STOP.
